expectations.text: Output contains a session summary with a 'What Got Done' section listing specific items
expectations.evidence: Has '### What Got Done' section with 5 specific bullet points covering session-closeout skill, goals.md, current-priorities.md, ideas.md, and CLAUDE.md

expectations.text: Output includes the final closeout block with all 4 fields: summary, decisions logged, priorities updated, memory saved
expectations.evidence: Ends with exact 'Session closed.' block containing all 4 fields in the specified format

expectations.text: Output references running git status or git diff to ground the summary
expectations.evidence: Agent explicitly ran git status and git diff --stat HEAD before writing summary

expectations.text: Output checks context/current-priorities.md and makes a judgment on whether it needs updating
expectations.evidence: 'Priorities Check' section explicitly states file was just updated this session and no change is needed
